mapper.insert: insert into work_order_process_log(order_no, log_type, content, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{logType}, #{content}, #{operatorUsername}, #{operatorDisplayName}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select id, order_no, log_type, content, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_process_log where id = #{id}
select id, order_no, log_type, content, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_process_log where order_no = #{orderNo} order by created_at desc
select id, order_no, log_type, content, operator_username, operator_display_name, created_at from work_order_process_log where order_no = #{orderNo} and log_type = #{logType} order by created_at desc
select count(1) from work_order_process_log where order_no = #{orderNo}
